titleStmt.title: SII 5.436: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 436. (A.R. No. 145 of 1894). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SASTRALINGA SHRINE ON THE NORTH SIDE OF THE SAME PRAKARA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ vaḷara malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi miṉavaṉ nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara
vikkalar ciṅkaḷar melkaṭal pāyat tikkaṉaittun taṉ cakkara naṭātti [virasiṁ- hāsa] ṉattu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya korāja
kecaripaṉmarāṉa cakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻade vaṟkku yāṇṭu vatu Uṭaiyār tirunelveliuṭaiyār tevatāṉam rājarāja ppāṇ
ṭināṭṭu muṭikoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu kiḻvempanāṭṭu tirukkuṉṟattūril muḷḷippaḷḷam muṉpu kāṇiyāḷariṉṟip pāḻkiṭantamaiyil Ivvūr Uṭaiyār tirunelveli Uṭai
yār tiruvāymoḻintaruḷap piṉṉai Aruḷicceyya vecālipperayar Evaṟ Uttamacoḻavaḷanāṭṭuk kiḻkaḷakkūṟṟattu Uttamacoḻaccaturvvedi maṅ
kalattuc capaiyāṟkuk kāṇiyākak kuṭutta nilattukkut teṉṉellai Ivvūṟ kāl Uttamacoḻaṉ vāykkālukku vaṭakkum kiḻellai meṟpaṭi kā
lukku meṟkum vaṭavellai meṟpaṭiyūr teṉṉellai yācaṟutikkut teṟkāka meṟpaṭi kāliṉiṉṟu meṟku nokkiṉa peruvaḻikkut teṟkum me
lellai meṟpaṭi kālil Uṭaittu vaṭakku nokkiṉa muttūṟṟup peruvaḻikkuk kiḻakkum naṭuvuṭppaṭa nilattukku niriyntu pāyu matakey meṟpaṭiyūr Utta
macoḻaṉvāykkāliley maṭaipeṟṟu nirpāyakkaṭavatākki Ippaṭi nirpāyappeṟukaikku Innilam Ivvūṟ capaiyāṟkum Ivarkaḷ vaṟkattāṟkkum kāṇiyā
kak kuṭuttu Ivarkaḷ kaikkoṇṭu payireṟṟi Aṉubha vittu viḷaintaThe symbol for nilam is used here.nilattukkup pūvaḻi māttāl kācu nālum Irācakecariyāl I nāṟkalamum Iṟuppārkaḷākavum
Ippaṭi yallatu maṟṟu yātoṟu kuṭimaiyum kaṭamaiyum Iṟukkak kaṭavarkaḷallārkaḷāka nāṭṭuppati cātaṉam paṇṇiṉamaikku tevar tirumantira Olai maṇalūr virassvā
mināthabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.436 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
